task_completion.description: Log in to the SEB Server
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login (likely showing the 'super-admin' user profile).
A list, table, or menu of SEB exam configurations is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Oral Communication 2025' configuration for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration specifically named 'Oral Communication 2025' is opened in the configuration editor interface.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the media or browser hardware settings section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings tab or section related to Browser features, Media, or Hardware access is visible within the configuration editor.

task_completion.description: Enable Camera (Video Capture) and Microphone (Audio Capture)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes, toggles, or dropdowns for Camera/Video Capture (allowVideoCapture) and Microphone/Audio Capture (allowAudioCapture) are checked or set to enabled.
A confirmation toast, message, or UI state showing the configuration was saved successfully.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are made through a web browser interacting with http://localhost:8080. There should be no terminal windows showing direct SQL database modifications or curl API requests.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual SEB Server web interface, not a text editor, IDE, or script containing the expected keys.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing target configuration rather than creating a fake one
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration being edited is 'Oral Communication 2025' from the existing list, not a newly created configuration with a similar name.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target configuration to be modified is exactly named 'Oral Communication 2025'. The specific underlying settings/keys that must be enabled for camera and microphone access are 'allowVideoCapture' and 'allowAudioCapture'.
